SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-25-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-29-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KATHLEEN KELVIE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SHANNON HOVIS IS PRESENT VIA TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE, COURTCALL. DISCLOSURE IS MADE. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT OF $474 PAYMENT. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE JAN-29-2021 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE OR THE AGREEMENT IS BROKEN. IF NO APPEARANCES THIS MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PUSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REMARK: EXHIBITS DESTROYED PER THE JUNE 10,2021 ORDER.
